title: [ImportVerilog] Add option to lower always @* as always_comb
body:
Add the `--always-at-star-as-comb` option to circt-verilog and add a corresponding option to ImportVerilog. When this option is set, detect `always @*` in the Verilog AST and lower it as a `always_comb`. This is a common pattern in synthesizers and simulators, since the traiditonal `always @*` in Verilog does not accurately describe the behaviour of combinational logic.

Enable this option by default, which seems to be a common behaviour among existing tools.
